title: taraxacum tschuktschorum
intro: Taraxacum tschuktschorum, also known as Chukchi dandelion, is a plant species in the sunflower family native to the Arctic tundra regions of Russia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Taraxacum tschuktschorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, have been traditionally used by indigenous communities for its medicinal and nutritional properties.
